intro: The debate over open-source AI models has dominated coverage, with industry observers arguing that American open models represent the strongest competitive response to Chinese alternatives, even as major AI labs reportedly lobby against this approach. Meta announced it will alert parents when teens discuss suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot, responding to mounting concerns about AI safety for young users. South Korea is accelerating development of a sovereign AI model for cybersecurity, citing worries about dependence on foreign systems for critical infrastructure protection.

whitelist.title: There’s One Way To Win The AI Race, And The Big Labs Are Lobbying Against It
whitelist.desc: There's one way to win the AI race, and the big labs are lobbying against it. The answer to Chinese open models is American open models. It's how America always wins.

whitelist.title: AI News, Artificial Intelligence Trends & Market Impact | Fortune | Section
whitelist.desc: Get the latest AI news, artificial intelligence trends & market insights from Fortune, your trusted source for new innovation & digital trends.
other_outlets: BGNES: Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

whitelist.title: Meta will alert parents to teens’ self-harm chats with AI
